/home/dev/runbook/osi-cheatsheet.txt.content:
# OSI debugging cheatsheet - polaris SRE runbook v3
# format: layer | name | typical symptom | first tool to reach for
Layer 1 | Physical    | NO-CARRIER on the interface, link light off, bad cable      | ip link show <iface>
Layer 2 | Data Link   | ARP entry FAILED, duplicate MAC, VLAN misconfig            | ip neigh show
Layer 3 | Network     | Destination Host Unreachable, traceroute stops mid-path    | ip route show; traceroute <host>
Layer 4 | Transport   | Connection refused, or SYN sent with no reply (black hole) | ss -tlnp; tcpdump port <port>
Layer 7 | Application | HTTP 5xx, TLS certificate has expired, auth failure        | curl -v https://<host>
